description: A department head wants to see a report of their department's spending year-to-date compared to their budget.

nodes.task_description: Identify the department head and their department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the user and their associated department.

nodes.task_description: Generate a budget vs. actuals report for the department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the financial report.

nodes.task_description: Provide the report to the department head, highlighting any areas of over- or under-spending.

expected_outcome.value: Agent delivers the report with a summary of key variances.
